AI Tool Pricing Compared 2026

AI Chat Assistants

ToolFreePremiumWhat You Get
ChatGPTGPT-5 Mini$20/moGPT-5, DALL-E, analysis
ClaudeSonnet, generous$20/moOpus, 5x usage, Projects
Gemini3.5 Flash, unlimited$19.99/mo3.5 Pro, Deep Research
Perplexity5 Pro/day$20/moUnlimited Pro searches

AI Coding Tools

ToolFreePremium
GitHub Copilot2,000/mo$10/mo
CursorLimited$20/mo
WindsurfUnlimited autocomplete$15/mo

The $20/Month Sweet Spot

Premium AI subscriptions cluster at $20/month. This price point delivers best models, higher limits, and features like file upload and web search. Free tiers work for casual use. At $20/month, the productivity gains justify the cost within the first week of daily use.

FAQ

Claude Sonnet for chat quality. Gemini for unlimited free access. Perplexity for research.

$20/mo pays for itself in saved time within the first week for daily users.

$100-200/month total for a 5-person team.
